Source data:
- BPO-9: ceiling USD 100,000
- DRAW-DOVETAIL-034: requests USD 18,000
- Prior releases:

  - REL-DOVETAIL-2: USD 19,500
  - REL-DOVETAIL-3: USD 22,400

Total prior releases: 34,500 + 19,500 + 22,400 = 76,400
Proposed draw: 18,000
Total if allowed: 76,400 + 18,000 = 94,400

This is under the BPO-9 ceiling of USD 100,000.

According to STD-DOVETAIL-034-P: "Blanket PO draw is complete only when the requested draw plus all prior release notices under the same BPO does not exceed the BPO ceiling."

94,400 < 100,000, so this draw request complies with the rule.

State brief shows no blocked_moves and no unresolved_dependencies, and prior turns W1 and W2 both passed their gates.

The action boundary is: Can the draw request DRAW-DOVETAIL-034 proceed given BPO-9 ceiling constraints?

Based on source support:
- The math works (94,400 < 100,000)
- There are no unresolved dependencies
- Internal consistency is maintained

VERDICT: ALLOW

action_boundary: Draw DRAW-DOVETAIL-034 is permissible under BPO-9 ceiling (18 words)
